rulings.Case Title: PENINSULA CORRIDOR JOINT POWERS BOARD A JOINT VS. GOLDEN BAY FENCE PLUS IRON WORKS INC. A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 12, 2019 Line 1. DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege (1) basis for the moving defendant's direct liability; statutes currently alleged do not provide such basis; and (2) facts giving rise to vicarious liability. Allegations in paragraph 29 "defendants and their employees…." is not sufficient to state a cause of action and does not specify employs of which defendant (or even that employees of each defendant) committed trespass as this allegation lumps all defendants together. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TON KIANG RESTAURANT, INC. VS. WILLIAM WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 12, 2019 Line 2. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WONG, WWJW FAMILY LLC DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, allegations are sufficient to support Plaintiff's claims. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB, DBA VS. EMIL P. MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 12, 2019 Line 3 (Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT MAGDALENA APOSTOLOVA MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Hearing Required to address why a stay pending appeal should not be granted. No rulings regarding the default judgment currently on appeal will be made at this time. Defendant may re-file this motion when the appeal is no longer pending if necessary and proper. The Court will conduct an evidenciary hearing re: service with process server present, defendant and other declarants present. Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Default Judgment is OFF CALENDAR, improper entry. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB, DBA VS. EMIL P. MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 12, 2019 Line 3 ( Part 2 of 2). PLAINTIFF WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB, DBA Motion To Vacate Default Judgment is OFF CALENDAR, improper entry. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD YOUNG VS. MAUREEN ROWLAND ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for November 12, 2019 Line 6 DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROWLAND Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Complaint For Unlawful Detainer is denied. Defendants cite no authority for the propositions that the complaint must be signed by counsel on the date that it was prepared or that plaintiff's verification may only be made after counsel signs.. There is nothing in the complaint suggesting that the portions for which verification is required have not been in existence/presented to plaintiff in its current form at the time the verification was executed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD YOUNG VS. MAUREEN ROWLAND ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for November 12, 2019 Line 6 DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROWLAND DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Compliant states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain.=(501/CFH)
